Off Calendar Aug-30-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
DEFENDANT GFT PROPERTIES, LLC'S AMENDED MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION OF ORDER (RE: PLAINTIFF'S MOTION TO ENFORCE SETTLEMENT).

APPEARANCES: Peter H. Bonis, Esq. of Law Offices of Peter H. Bonis 925/287-6428 for pltfs; Andrew Cross, Esq. of Garlock & Company (tel. # crossed out on business card) for deft GFT Properties, LLC; Jonathan Fried, Esq. 986-7000 for 300 Parking Street LLC; Paul Smoot, Esq. 650/548-0900 for deft Jon Fried.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling - DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION IS GRANTED. PROPER NOTICE OF INTENT TO APPEAR TO CONTEST THE TENTATIVE RULING WAS NOT GIVEN TO DEFENDANT'S ATTORNEY OF RECORD. PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST FOR SANCTIONS IS DENIED. The Court set a further briefing schedule on the motion to enforce settlement. Mr. Cross, counsel for deft GFT Properties, LLC, to file response by 09/07/11. Plaintiffs reply to be filed by 09/12/11. The Court set 09/22/11 for hearing on plaintiffs motion to enforce settlement. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR #5797
